locations.name: Sunny Meadow
locations.flavorText: Rolling grass and wildflowers stretch to the tree line.

locations.name: Old Forest
locations.flavorText: Tangled canopy overhead, wings buzzing somewhere close.

locations.name: Tide Pools
locations.flavorText: Cool water laps at the rocks, clear down to the sand.

locations.name: Craggy Peak
locations.flavorText: Thin air and sharp stone, wind whistling through the pass.

locations.name: Dry Basin
locations.flavorText: Cracked earth under a hot, wide-open sky.

locations.name: Old Town
locations.flavorText: Quiet streets and flickering signs, faintly humming with static.
